channel.title: FMaInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMaInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Figma stock moves as chart reveals interesting trend
item.description: Figma shares trade lower Thursday, extending recent downtrend and underperforming market.

item.title: Southwest forecasts Q2 EPS $0.35-$0.65 amid fuel uncertainty, targets 16.5%-18.5% revenue growth
Selective reaffirms 2026 combined ratio 96.5%-97.5% and $465M investment income amid competition
Trump secures double court victories on ICE and 'Alligator Alcatraz'
item.description: Trump administration wins two legal victories on immigration; appeals court clears Florida project.

item.title: Dr Pepper parent boosts profits despite inflation
item.description: Keurig Dr Pepper shares rise after Q1 earnings beat expectations on sales and pricing.

item.title: Selective Insurance Group Q1 2026 earnings call transcript
JPMorgan lowers Robinhood valuation multiple after management chat ahead of earnings
item.description: Analysts estimate Robinhood Q1 revenue $1.14B, EPS $0.39, per Fiscal AI.

item.title: Helen of Troy stock gains on earnings beat
item.description: Helen of Troy surges on strong earnings and upbeat outlook despite margin pressure.

item.title: AZZ Inc. Q4 2026 earnings call transcript
Hurricane Helene debris fuels Georgia wildfires
Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as less dangerous in historic shift
item.description: Cannabis group calls Trump's reclassification 'the most significant' change.

item.title: Charts show Iran's economy in freefall
item.description: Iran's economy, already vulnerable, now deteriorates further amid war.

item.title: Deutsche Rohstoff AG Q4 2025 earnings call transcript
Analyst report: AT&T Inc
Esther Wojcicki, 'Godmother of Silicon Valley,' shares secret to raising leaders
item.description: Wojcicki draws inspiration from her daughters' public failures and pivots to success.

item.title: Kroger offers new customer savings as grocery prices rise
item.description: Kroger introduces new savings program in response to changing spending habits.

item.title: Hungary: Crossroads Ahead
item.description: Hungary faces pivotal election amid economic improvement but policy and governance concerns.

item.title: American Airlines CEO says United merger 'bad for customers'
item.description: CEO Robert Isom rejects United merger as anti-competitive and harmful to customers.

item.title: Analyst report: Newmont Corp
Millions of Americans may discover they are Canadian through ancestry
item.description: Canadian ancestry could grant citizenship to millions of Americans.
